DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT OUR NEIGHBORHOOD PLACE, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH SUBPOENA NOTICE.THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING - MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RENEWAL UPON PROPER PROOF. DEFENDANT MOVES TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH A DEPOSITION SUBPOENA AND FOR SANCTIONS. HOWEVER, DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SUBMIT PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE MOTION ON THE WITNESS AS REQUIRED. CCP 2023.030. IF SATISFACTORY PROOF OF SERVICE (INCLUDING THE AUTHORITY, POSITION OR STATUS OF THE PERSON SERVED) AND OF AN ADEQUATE OPPORTUNITY TO BE HEARD IS SUBMITTED UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY AT OR BEFORE THE HEARING, THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT WILL NOT ORDER SANCTIONS AGAINST THE NON-PARTY WITNESS. HOWEVER, THE COURT NOTES THAT IT IS EMPOWERED TO HOLD THE WITNESS IN CONTEMPT WITHOUT A PRIOR ORDER FOR COMPLIANCE UNDER THESE CIRCUMSTANCES. CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTIONS 2025.440(B) AND 2020.240. THUS, NON-COMPLIANCE WITH AN ORDER FOR COMPLIANCE WITH THE SUBPOENA MAY RESULT IN A CONTEMPT CITATION. OTHERWISE, THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RENEWAL UPON PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Subpoena Notice
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT OUR NEIGHBORHOOD PLACE, LLC's Motion To Compel Compliance With Subpoena Notice.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling - Motion is Denied without Prejudice to renewal upon proper proof.

Defendant moves to compel compliance with a deposition subpoena and for sanctions. However, defendant has failed to submit proof of service of the motion on the witness as required. CCP 2023.030. If satisfactory proof of service (including the authority, position or status of the person served) and of an adequate opportunity to be heard is submitted under penalty of perjury at or before the hearing, the motion will be granted. The Court will not order sanctions against the non-party witness. However, the Court notes that it is empowered to hold the witness in contempt without a prior order for compliance under these circumstances. Code of Civil Procedure Sections 2025.440(b) and 2020.240. Thus, non-compliance with an order for compliance with the subpoena may result in a contempt citation. Otherwise, the motion will be denied without prejudice to renewal upon proper proof of service.

The Court will prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
